chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1203 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.19/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.20/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.21/2026 (R/Surety) 13.01.2026 Mr. Hajjan Shah, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Ali Gohar, who on 12.12.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate of such amount, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from diary dated 16.12.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
